title: Bridge Essay: Improving quality of life using compound mind-body therapies: evaluation of a co

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Improving, quality, of, life, using.

**Improving quality of life using compound mind-body therapies: evaluation of acourse intervention with body movement and breath therapy, guided imagery, chakra experiencing and mindfulness meditation.** — Qual Life Res. PMID: 18324479. DOI: 10.1007/s11136-008-9321-x. Assess changes in quality of life and in sense of coherence (SOC), after an intervention involving aself-development course using mind-body medicine (MBM) activities. Aquestionnaire study using ahealth-related quality of life (HRQOL) instrument, the SWEDQUAL, with 13 subscales and scores ranging from 0 to 100, combined with the SOC-13 scale, healthcare utilisation, medication and sick listing data.
